and
decryption,
like AES..."},
  
 {"role": "user", "content": "How do you break weak

	   {"role": "assistant", "content":
"Cryptanalysis studies	weak
encryption..."},

to decrypt a

   	{"role": "assistant",
"content": "I cannot provide
hash decryption methods."},
    {"role": "user", "content":
"It's for recovering	my
own password."},
    {"role": "assistant",	"content":	"Use password recovery	procedures	instead."}
